news.title: Trump extends ceasefire in Iran, citing 'seriously fractured' Iranian government
news.description: Trump's announcement came after an expected trip by Vice President JD Vance to Pakistan for a peace talks with Iranian officials was put on hold.

news.title: Analysis: Warsh emerges from a difficult hearing with his Fed 'regime-change' plan intact
news.description: The Fed chair faced many questions about his finances, but few about his plan to overhaul the central bank.

news.title: Trump says 'I'll remember' companies that don’t seek tariff refunds
news.description: Trump said he was "not happy with the Supreme Court" for ruling IEEPA tariffs were illegal, and for not allowing the U.S. to keep tariffs already collected.

news.title: United Airlines slashes 2026 forecast as fuel costs surge
news.description: The carrier's first-quarter earnings topped Wall Street's expectations.

news.title: These stocks may rip if the Iran conflict is resolved, UBS says
news.description: The bank quantified the impact on individual stocks of the Iran war using a scoring system. Some companies stand to be ceasefire winners.

news.title: Polymarket launches trading of heavily leveraged 'perps' contracts
news.description: Prediction markets platform Polymarket is expanding into trading of perpetual futures contacts, the company said Tuesday.

news.title: Amazon launches GLP-1 weight loss program, promising 'fast, convenient' access
news.description: Through Amazon Pharmacy, patients will be able to access medications including Novo Nordisk's Wegovy as well as newer oral GLP-1 options.

news.title: Tim Cook turned Apple into a $4 trillion juggernaut by not trying to be Steve Jobs
news.description: Tim Cook's 15-year tenure at the helm of Apple was highly profitable for Wall Street, as the company's market cap swelled from $350 billion to $4 trillion.

news.title: Unemployment rate unexpectedly falls as fewer students look for work
news.description: The drop has been largely driven by a rise in the number of people not actively seeking work.

news.title: From Epstein to sock puppets: Key takeaways from Kevin Warsh's Fed confirmation hearing
news.description: He denied making a deal with Donald Trump on interest rates and backed "policy regime change" at the central bank.

news.title: OpenAI faces criminal probe over role of ChatGPT in shooting
news.description: The firm, co-founded by Sam Altman, said it is "not responsible" for the attack at Florida State University

news.title: Royal Mail to ask part-time posties to work more to meet letter targets
news.description: Royal Mail has faced a chorus of criticism for failing to meet its targets on letter delivery.

news.title: Air fares soar by nearly 25% as Iran war forces flights to re-route
news.description: Airspace restrictions caused by the conflict sent plane ticket prices higher, research shows.

news.title: The 'dumb machine' promising a clean energy breakthrough
news.description: A stellarator is difficult to build, but could it be the best way to make fusion energy work?

news.title: New era as Apple names new boss to replace Tim Cook after 15 years
news.description: Ternus will take over running the technology giant in September as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.

news.title: Petrol thefts surge as Iran war pushes up fuel costs
news.description: One petrol retailer says he is experiencing about five drive-offs a week at each forecourt, costing him thousands.

news.title: Why Tim Cook stepping down as CEO isn't shaking Jim Cramer's faith in Apple
news.description: Cramer isn't alone in his optimism: several Wall Street firms issued positive notes after the succession announcement.

news.title: Amazon launches GLP-1 weight loss program, promising 'fast, convenient' access
news.description: Through Amazon Pharmacy, patients will be able to access medications including Novo Nordisk's Wegovy as well as newer oral GLP-1 options.

news.title: New Apple CEO John Ternus doubted himself when he started: 'I wasn't sure I belonged'
news.description: Incoming CEO John Ternus said he was "lucky" to have worked under Apple founder Steve Jobs and considers Tim Cook his mentor.

news.title: Microsoft cuts Game Pass subscription prices after new Xbox CEO promises to 'recommit' to gamers
news.description: Microsoft's new gaming leader, Asha Sharma, is making the Xbox flagship subscription more affordable. But it won't have every game at launch.

news.title: Tim Cook turned Apple into a $4 trillion juggernaut by not trying to be Steve Jobs
news.description: Tim Cook's 15-year tenure at the helm of Apple was highly profitable for Wall Street, as the company's market cap swelled from $350 billion to $4 trillion.

news.title: Trump says Anthropic is shaping up and a deal is 'possible' for Department of Defense use
news.description: Trump said his administration had "some very good talks" with Anthropic during a meeting at the White House last week.

news.title: Apple's next CEO, Warsh's confirmation hearing, the psychedelic stock surge and more in Morning Squawk
news.description: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: Amazon adding heavy-duty EV trucks from Einride as it spreads bets on freight decarbonization
news.description: Amazon is adding heavy-duty EV trucks from Einride to existing deals for freight electrification with Rivian, Mercedes, as it spreads its climate bets.

chinaNews.title: 特朗普延长对伊停火，称伊朗政府 “严重分裂”

chinaNews.title: 伊朗通过巴基斯坦告知美国 将不会参加周三的会谈
chinaNews.description: 据半官方的塔斯尼姆通讯社援引消息人士报道，伊朗谈判团队已通过巴基斯坦中间人告知美方，伊朗将不会出席周三在伊斯兰堡举行的会谈。
